---
title: "UAV in Environmental Science"
id: material-introduction-1
summary: "A broad review of UAV remote sensing covering platforms, data types, workflows, and major application domains."
source_url: "https://www.mdpi.com/2504-446X/7/6/398"
modules:
  - module-introduction
Goals:
  - module-goals
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
labels:
  - basics
  - mandatory
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/introduction/material-2.md"
---

## Read the article:

[A Review on Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Remote Sensing](https://www.mdpi.com/2504-446X/7/6/398)

---

[**Module:** UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
